procedure_steps.description:
The student should shift the lever but it is already
in the neutral.
The student slides the shift onto the mountain bike.
The student approaches the toolbox to grab bolt and washer.
The student inserts the washer and the bolt into the peg.
The student shifts through every gear.
The student uses the remote to lift the atv.
The student turns off the remote control.
The student shifts through all the gears.
The student detaches the screw using the ratchet.
The student places the screw and washer back.
The student places the ratchet on the ground.
The student unlocks the shift arm.

events.description:
The student should shift the lever but it is already
in the neutral.
The student slides the shift onto the mountain bike.
The student approaches the toolbox to grab bolt and washer.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The stundet tightens the screw in the wrong way.
The student inserts the washer and the bolt into the peg.
The student shifts through every gear.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student holds the quality_control_bench in a wrong way.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student holds the quality_control_bench in a wrong way.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student presses the wrong button.
The student uses the remote to lift the atv.
The student turns off the remote control.
The student grabs the ratchet.
The student shifts through all the gears.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student should slide the ratchet_adjuster first.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student screws the bolt.

events.correction_type: Wrong Action, corrected by instructor verbally
events.description: The student screws the bolt.
The student drops the bolt and washer accidentally.
The student detaches the screw using the ratchet.
The student places the screw and washer back.
The student places the ratchet on the ground.
The student unlocks the shift arm.
